[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100000001 2
1 000000000 a
2 000000000 a
3 000000000 a
4 000000000 a
5 000000000 a
6 101010100 4
7 000000100 1

12 21 000000001 1
23 32 101000001 3
34 43 000000000 a match 1 2 3 4 5

70 07 100000001 2 match 0
